overview.description: The iShares iBonds Dec 2036 Term Corporate ETF (IBCB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks a Bloomberg index composed of USD-denominated, investment-grade corporate bonds maturing between January 1, 2036, and December 15, 2036.
